user_query: I just noticed Day 2 has no breakfast, my first meeting is at 9am and I'll be starving. Add a quick hotel breakfast before the meeting.

fields.name: Hotel Breakfast
fields.description: Quick breakfast at the hotel buffet to start the day with energy before the meeting.

insertion_point.reasoning: Position 0 places the breakfast before the 9AM meeting, ensuring the user has time to eat before starting their workday.
